_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: S100 (tumor cell markers) was expressed in about 25% of the population, indicating the expression of tumor markers in C6 cells
details: S100 tumor marker expressed in 25% of C6 cell population
